subcodes.first_line: Blessed is the soul that reclineth upon its couch, its heart illumined with love for all the peoples of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی از برای نفسیکه در فراش تکیه نماید و قلبش به محبت اهل عالم منور باشد
subcodes.subjects: @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
